hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 2.63 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Syiah Kuala, Lambaro Skep, Kec. Kuta Alam

nearbyPlaces.name: Ikatan Dokter Indonesia Cabang Banda Aceh

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A cheap hotel, yet with very good quality. It does not provide breakfast, but the hotel location has many cafes, coffee shops, and places to eat and have breakfast.
comments.originalComment: Hotel yg murah, namun kualitas sgt bagus. Memang tidak menyediakan sarapan namun lokasi hotel banyak cafe, warkop dan tempat makan dan sarapan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Cannot stay, the order ID is resold to someone else. When I wanted to check in, it turned out that someone else had already checked in first. The hotel is not responsible.
comments.reviewTitle: Cannot stay, Order ID is sold again to someone else.
comments.originalTitle: Tidak bisa menginap ID Pesanan di jual lagi ke orang lain
comments.originalComment:
Tidak bisa menginap ID pesanan di jual lagi ke orang lain
Waktu saya mau checkin ternyata sudah ada orang lain yg duluan checkin 
Pihak hotel tidak bertanggung jawab

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is really nice for that price, the facilities are very satisfying... Next time I'll come here again🥰
comments.originalComment: Kamar nya bagus banget dengan harga segitu fasilitas kamar sangat memuaskan…. Next time bakal kesini lagi🥰

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Tempat lokasinya strategis dekat jalan raya.  Kamar bersih, dan staf yang ramah. Fasilitasnya lengkap. Secara keseluruhan sangat worth it dengan harga yang ditawarkan..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: bagus keren hotel nya staf nya pun ramah2
